last_progress_message: Child review completed successfully. Elapsed: 8m16s. Saved report: docs/codex-reviews/2026-07-10-2034-performance-review-report.md
residual_risk_summary: Direct repo evidence cannot predict the real-library rollout without its workload distribution and storage environment.
Tracemalloc excludes some native allocations and is not peak RSS; large-file field memory may be higher or lower than the focused values.
The 100 MiB extrapolation is intentionally labeled as inference; only 8/16/32 MiB inputs were measured.
